---
mode: ask
model: claude-sonnet-4-6
description: "Analyze business impact of a feature or change"
---

# /business-impact

## Steps
1. Read SPECIFICATION.md for feature scope
2. Identify affected personas and workflows
3. Estimate impact on key metrics
4. Identify risks

## Output
- Feature: [name]
- Affected Users: [personas]
- Expected Benefits: [measurable]
- Risks: [with mitigation]
- Recommendation: [proceed/modify/defer]
